title: Bonney Sees Kuma’s Memories
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on King Bekori, Unknown person #10, Saturn, Unknown person #11, CP0, Unknown person #12 as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: King Bekori
dialogue.text: Kingdom of sorbet

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: KUMACH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: Bonney- Chan!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been so long!! Are you finally home for good?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They said I'll be all better in a year...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I'll finally be able to go outside!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: IS THAT RIGHT? THAT'S FANTASTIC NEWS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YOU ALWAYS SAID YOU'D BE FIT AS A FIDDLE BY THE TIME YOU TURNED 10!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DOES THIS MEAN I'LL BE TAKING CARE OF YOU AGAAN, BONNEY?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: GRANNY CONNEY!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Member of Soviet Royal Family Queen Downager Conney

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WE WOULD BE MORE THAN HAPPY TO TAKE CARE OF HER, KUMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yeah, you can count on us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Thank you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll leave her in your hands.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm still a pirate after all... if I stay, it won't be good for the kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't think I'll be back for at least a year...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What?! that long?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll write you tons of letters!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oookay!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The next I see you, we'll both be able to sail the seas and reach the horizon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I can't wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanna travel to all sorts of places together!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'd love to take you--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I really would have loved that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: PLEASE LEAVE THE REST TO US...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ....Kuma- San.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Who's that?!

dialogue.speaker: CP0
dialogue.text: Cipher pol no 8 intelligence agent ALPHA*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm a nurse!! The doctor ordered me to take care of Bonney-chan during her recovery.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll check her temperature daily, make sure she takes her medicine, and monitor for any changes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My name is Alpha.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: Nice to meet you, Bonney- Chan:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No suspicious individuals will be allowed near her during recovery.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please remember to bring identification with you if you plan on visiting!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's such a pain!! And what's that building you're putting up in front of the church?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Those are our accommodation- Dations!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't forget...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...a child's life is such a fragile thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I under- stand... I'm not coming back.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: Thank you, Bonney.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm so glad you were born!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Really?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: She he held

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
